get.summary: Admin diagnostic — checks object-storage configuration and connectivity.
Search AI music tracks for discovery, recommendation, and licensing

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Musical key, for example D minor or C major

parameters.name: aiGenerator
parameters.description: Generator used to create the track, for example Suno or Udio

parameters.name: useCase
parameters.description: Intended use case, for example youtube_background_music, trailer, ad, podcast

post.summary: Register a new account. Every account is created as a Creator (Role=Creator).
Log in with email and password.

get.summary: Check if Google OAuth is configured on this server.

post.summary: Log in or register with a Google ID token.
Set password for Google-only accounts.
Link Google account to existing local account. Requires auth.

get.summary: Get current user profile with full account details. Requires authentication.

post.summary: Log out. Clears auth_token cookie.
Refresh JWT token. Requires valid (or within clock-skew) token.
Set username during onboarding (one-time, immutable). Returns fresh JWT.

get.summary: Auth health check.
Check username availability (public, no auth required).

post.summary: Request password reset code via email or SMS.
Verify password reset code.
Reset password using verified code.
Send username recovery email.

get.summary: Get current user settings profile (includes subscription details).

post.summary: Alias for PUT /settings/password.
Request email change. Sends verification link.

get.summary: Complete email change via verification token.

post.summary: Re-send the initial email verification link to the authenticated user.

get.summary: Complete initial email verification via the link token.

put.summary: Update display name. Alias for PUT /auth/display-name.

get.summary: Get public creator profile by slug.

404.description: Creator not found or storefront feature disabled.

get.summary: Full creator storefront. Requires creator_storefront feature flag.

schema.description: Envelope with data=CreatorProfileMeResponse when profile exists, or data={ exists: false } when not yet created.

exists.description: Always false when profile not yet created.

get.summary: Get own creator profile. Returns { exists: false } if profile not yet created, or full profile if exists.

put.summary: Create or update own creator profile (slug, bio, niche, social links, stats toggles).

post.summary: Upload cover image. Alias for POST /creator-profile/me/banner.
Upload banner/cover image. Canonical endpoint.
Upload profile image. Alias for POST /creator-profile/me/avatar.
Upload avatar/profile image. Canonical endpoint.
Upload profile avatar. Alias for POST /creator-profile/me/avatar.
Create a track collection.

put.summary: Update a collection. Only the owner can update.

delete.summary: Delete a collection. Only the owner can delete.

get.summary: Get public creator profile by UUID.
Get public creator profile by username.
Resolve creator by legacy identifier (ApplicationUser.Id, UUID, or username).
Get tracks by creator UUID. Canonical endpoint.
Get tracks by creator slug (username) or GUID. Alias — canonical: GET /api/creators/{creatorId}/tracks.
Check username availability. Canonical endpoint.
Check username availability. Alias for GET /api/creators/username-availability.

schema.description: Returns CreatorMeResponse when creator row exists, or CreatorMePartialResponse when username not set.

get.summary: Get own creator profile. Returns partial response with needsUsername=true if username not yet set.

put.summary: Update own creator profile (username, displayName, bio, images, social links). Username is immutable once set.

post.summary: Generate a presigned PUT URL for direct S3/R2 image upload.
Follow a creator. Idempotent.

get.summary: Get license certificate details.
List license certificates for the current user.
Publicly verify that a license certificate exists and is valid.
Get public user profile by username.

patch.summary: Update own profile (bio, profileImageUrl, coverImageUrl). Syncs to CreatorProfile.

post.summary: Public waitlist signup. Idempotent on email.

get.summary: Get AI-friendly track details
Get available license options for a track
Get preview information for a track
Get public creator profile and catalog summary

put.summary: Edit track metadata. Only the track owner can edit.

get.summary: List distinct genres with track counts.

post.summary: Create a new API key. Raw key is returned once and never stored. Requires JWT (cannot use API key to create keys).

get.summary: List active API keys (prefix + metadata, no hashes). Requires JWT.

delete.summary: Revoke (soft-delete) an API key. Requires JWT.

post.summary: Bulk upgrade user tiers. Requires Admin role.
Upgrade a specific user's tier. Requires Admin role.

get.summary: Verify a license certificate. Public endpoint. Canonical V1 path.

post.summary: Initiate license purchase checkout. Returns a Stripe checkout URL.

schema.description: V1 raw response (not wrapped in ApiResponse envelope).

checkoutUrl.description: Stripe checkout URL to redirect the user to.

get.summary: Search and browse tracks with pagination.
Get track details by ID (GUID or CambrianTrackId).
Get public creator profile by UUID or username.

ApiEnvelope.description: Standard API response envelope. All endpoints wrap responses in this shape.

data.description: Response payload. Null on error responses.

SessionUser.description: User identity returned in login/register/google session responses.

username.description: Null if username not yet set (needsUsername=true).

AuthSessionResponse.description: Response from POST /auth/register, /auth/login, /auth/google. Wrapped in ApiEnvelope.data.

role.description: Currently always "Creator" — every account is a creator.

isNewUser.description: True when account was just registered and username not yet set.

needsUsername.description: True when user.username is null (username setup not complete).

requiresUsernameSetup.description: Alias for needsUsername. Both fields are always identical.

AuthMeResponse.description: Response from GET /auth/me. Wrapped in ApiEnvelope.data.

canChangeUsername.description: False once username has been set (usernames are immutable).

CreatorMeResponse.description: Response from GET /api/creator/me when Creator row exists.

CreatorMePartialResponse.description: Response from GET /api/creator/me when Creator row does not exist yet (username not set). Frontend should check needsUsername and prompt for username setup.

PublicCreatorDto.description: Public creator profile. Returned by GET /api/creators/{id}, /resolve/{identifier}, /by-username/{username}.

TrackResponse.description: Track data returned by catalog, creator, and search endpoints.

CreatorProfileDto.description: Creator profile (from CreatorProfile table). Returned by /creator-profile endpoints.

CreatorProfileMeResponse.description: Response from GET /creator-profile/me when profile exists.

StorefrontResponse.description: Full creator storefront with profile, tracks, and collections.

uploadUrl.description: Presigned PUT URL (S3/R2) or proxy upload endpoint.

publicUrl.description: Public CDN URL for the uploaded file.

ApiKeyCreateResponse.description: Returned once on key creation. The raw key is never shown again.

key.description: Raw API key (cbr_ prefix + 32 hex bytes). Store securely.

Bearer.description: JWT bearer token. Also accepts auth_token cookie.

ApiKey.name: X-API-Key
ApiKey.description: API key (cbr_ prefix). Cannot be used for key management endpoints.
